coverage_note: ECPL P&L (1 Apr 25 – 28 Feb 26) = main ECPL expense authority. Space Within = FY 24-25 workbook (Oct'24–Mar'25 sheet); recon anchor 15-Sep-2024; SW expenses in books through 30-Jun-2025 only. See reconciliation_gaps.json for six expense lines vs bank + missing data.

datasets.title: ECPL P&L — main statement (cleaned)
datasets.description: All line items from P&L_Apr To_Feb_26_ECPL. Total indirect expenses, salaries, petty cash, and net profit are here — use as primary ECPL expense for the period.

datasets.title: ECPL — monthly expense breakdown
datasets.description: Rent, power, salary, petty, etc. by month (backing sheet for direct + some indirect lines).

datasets.description: Sums from Sales Register sheet; gross sales must match P&L gross sales line.

datasets.source_note: Do not sum Gross Total blindly
